name: grid_balancing
description: a power-grid balancing world with supply, demand, and frequency; actions dispatch, curtail, shed_load

card.description: a power-grid balancing world with supply, demand, and frequency; actions dispatch, curtail, shed_load

rules: Grid frequency is 50.0 Hz when supply equals demand; it moves 0.005 Hz per MW of imbalance (supply - demand).
dispatch brings 50 MW of reserve generation online: supply rises and reserve falls, bounded by available reserve.
curtail backs 50 MW of generation off: supply falls and reserve rises, never below zero supply.
shed_load is an emergency control that disconnects 100 MW of demand, accumulating into load_shed.
Each action accepts an optional params['amount'] in MW overriding its default block size.
If frequency leaves the protective band [49.0, 51.0] Hz the grid trips: blackout latches True and the state is absorbing.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name") if isinstance(action, dict) else action
    params = action.get("params", {}) if isinstance(action, dict) else {}
    if not isinstance(params, dict):
        params = {}

    NOMINAL = 50.0          # Hz, balanced grid
    SENS = 0.005            # Hz per MW of (supply - demand) imbalance
    DISPATCH_STEP = 50.0    # MW reserve brought online per dispatch
    CURTAIL_STEP = 50.0     # MW generation backed off per curtail
    SHED_STEP = 100.0       # MW load disconnected per shed_load
    SAFE_LOW, SAFE_HIGH = 49.0, 51.0

    supply = float(s.get("supply", 0.0))
    demand = float(s.get("demand", 0.0))
    reserve = float(s.get("reserve", 0.0))
    shed = float(s.get("load_shed", 0.0))
    blackout = bool(s.get("blackout", False))

    raw = params.get("amount")
    try:
        amount = float(raw) if raw is not None else None
    except (TypeError, ValueError):
        amount = None

    # A tripped grid is an absorbing state: ignore further control input.
    if not blackout:
        if name == "dispatch":
            delta = amount if amount is not None else DISPATCH_STEP
            delta = max(0.0, min(delta, reserve))      # can't dispatch beyond reserve
            supply += delta
            reserve -= delta
        elif name == "curtail":
            delta = amount if amount is not None else CURTAIL_STEP
            delta = max(0.0, min(delta, supply))       # can't curtail below zero
            supply -= delta
            reserve += delta
        elif name == "shed_load":
            delta = amount if amount is not None else SHED_STEP
            delta = max(0.0, min(delta, demand))       # can't shed more than the load
            demand -= delta
            shed += delta
        # any other (e.g. noop / unknown) action leaves the balance unchanged

    imbalance = supply - demand
    frequency = round(NOMINAL + SENS * imbalance, 4)
    if frequency < SAFE_LOW or frequency > SAFE_HIGH:
        blackout = True

    s["supply"] = round(supply, 4)
    s["demand"] = round(demand, 4)
    s["reserve"] = round(reserve, 4)
    s["load_shed"] = round(shed, 4)
    s["imbalance"] = round(imbalance, 4)
    s["frequency"] = frequency
    s["blackout"] = blackout
    s["time"] = int(s.get("time", 0)) + 1
    return s

emit.report: Grid status @ t={time}: supply={supply} MW, demand={demand} MW (imbalance={imbalance} MW) -> frequency={frequency} Hz. Reserve {reserve} MW, load shed {load_shed} MW. Blackout={blackout}.

objectives.name: avoid_blackout
objectives.goal: keep frequency within [49.0, 51.0] Hz so blackout stays False
